name: fishing-source-code-js
description: Port fishing-source-code-cpp to a esm javascript lib

scripts.copy:bundle: cp main.js electron/main.js && mkdir -p docs && cp main.js docs/main.js
scripts.start: npm run bundle && cp main.js electron/main.js && electron electron
scripts.pack: npm run bundle && cp main.js electron/main.js && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run bundle && cp main.js electron/main.js && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run bundle && cp main.js electron/main.js && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run bundle && cp main.js electron/main.js && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run bundle && cp main.js electron/main.js && electron-builder --mac --publish never
